MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:DEFENDANT AARON CHONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to November 7, 2014. Parties shall resubmit courtesy copies of the moving papers, opposition and reply to department 501 no later than October 24, 2014 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Defendant Aaron Chong'S Motion For Change Of Venue To Be Heard With The Pending Motion To Change Venue In The Related Case (Ptr-11-295018).
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard: PTR-11-295018 & CGC-14-538467.

Appearances: Jerilyn Paik (via court call) for Aaron Chong (Trustee & moving party). Michael Spalding for Alvin Chong. David Yang for Aileen Chong.

Mr. Spalding stated that he was unaware of a separate motion being filed in the trust matter, and did not receive moving papers of such and cited code 396(b) as waiving the right for such as untimely as there were no objections brought forth when the response was filed. Ms. Paik stated that the amended petition filed opened up the time for filing the request for change of venue. Counsel presented oral argument in support of their positions for timeliness of the motion for change of venue and the principle place of administration of the trust. After hearing the oral argument, the court instructed all counsel to submit proposed orders in each case no later than September 30, 2014 which should address the waiver under 396(b), and the matter will be taken under submission as of October 1, 2014.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
